transcription.text: Introducing All with InWash Pre-Treaters. To prove how amazing it cleans, we set out to find tough stains. And every mom knows, Little League plays mean Major League stains. And now All is the official detergent of Little League Baseball. All combines InWash Pre-Treaters with its active stain lifters to attack tough grass stains for more cleaning power than just washing with the leading value detergent and booster combined. Give us your worst, we'll give it our all. We'll be right back.
